S.FORM: Nga'ay ho. pasifanaen no singsi samaanen sano Amisen a pasowal ko kakaenen hananay anini.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj ħo~u. pasifanaən no~u siŋsi samaanən sano~u amisən a paso~uwaɾ ko~u kakaənən ħananaj anini.
S.FORM: Nga'ay ho. pasifanaen no singsi samaanen sano Amisen a pasowal ko kakaenen hananay anini.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj ħo~u. pasifanaən no~u siŋsi samaanən sano~u amisən a paso~uwaɾ ko~u kakaənən ħananaj anini.
S.TRANSL: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的阿美語怎麼說。
Hello everyone. Today, I am going to teach you how to say the Ami language for food.

S.FORM: Mafana'ay a mitengil to sowal no singsi haw?
S.PHON: mafanaʡaj a mitəŋiɾ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u siŋsi ħaw?
S.FORM: Mafana'ay a mitengil to sowal no singsi haw?
S.PHON: mafanaʡaj a mitəŋiɾ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u siŋsi ħaw?
S.TRANSL: Do you understand what the teacher says?

S.FORM: singsi, mafokilay kako, ngaayay ho miliyaw a somowal haw?
S.PHON: siŋsi, mafo~ukiɾaj kako~u, ŋaajaj ħo~u miɾijaw a so~umo~uwaɾ ħaw?
S.FORM: singsi, mafokilay kako, ngaayay ho miliyaw a somowal haw?
S.PHON: siŋsi, mafo~ukiɾaj kako~u, ŋaajaj ħo~u miɾijaw a so~umo~uwaɾ ħaw?
S.TRANSL: 老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
I don't understand. Can you repeat it again?

S.FORM: awaay matengil ako, ngaayay taangayen ko ngiha haw?
S.PHON: awaaj matəŋiɾ ako~u, ŋaajaj taaŋajən ko~u ŋiħa ħaw?

S.TRANSL: 我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
I can't hear you, can you speak louder?

S.FORM: nengnengen i tini! do^doen kako a miosi.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋən i tini! ɬ~ɮo~uʔɬ~ɮo~uən kako~u a mio~usi.

Look here, please! Repeat after me.

S.PHON: wataħ! aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u niko~urko~uran iso~u a ko~uŋa.
S.TRANSL: (sighs) Wow! You dug up so many gourds.

S.FORM: Pacafayen ho kako a miteli i kofaw haw?
S.PHON: paʦafajən ħo~u kako~u a mitəɾi i ko~ufaw ħaw?
S.FORM: Pacafayen ho kako a miteli i kofaw haw?
S.PHON: paʦafajən ħo~u kako~u a mitəɾi i ko~ufaw ħaw?
S.TRANSL: Will you help me with the barn?

S.FORM: Nimaanay kamo?

S.FORM: Nimaanay kamo?
S.PHON: nimaanaj kamo~u?

S.FORM: Micadiwayay kami.
S.PHON: miʦaɬ~ɮiwajaj kami.
S.FORM: Micadiwayay kami.
S.PHON: miʦaɬ~ɮiwajaj kami.
S.TRANSL: We're releasing fishing nets to catch fish.

S.FORM: Adihayay ko foting itini haw?

S.FORM: Adihayay ko foting itini haw?

S.FORM: Adihay to ko foting i kopid.
S.PHON: aɬ~ɮiħaj to~u ko~u fo~utiŋ i ko~upiɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: Adihay to ko foting i kopid.
S.PHON: aɬ~ɮiħaj to~u ko~u fo~utiŋ i ko~upiɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 魚簍裡已經抓了很多魚。
The fish basket has been full of fish.

S.FORM: Samaanan iso a mifoting?
S.PHON: samaanan iso~u a mifo~utiŋ?
S.FORM: Samaanan iso a mifoting?
S.PHON: samaanan iso~u a mifo~utiŋ?
S.TRANSL: How do you usually catch fish?

S.FORM: tano 'idocen no mako a mifoting.
S.PHON: tano~u ʡiɬ~ɮo~uʦən no~u mako~u a mifo~utiŋ.
S.FORM: tano 'idocen no mako a mifoting.
S.PHON: tano~u ʡiɬ~ɮo~uʦən no~u mako~u a mifo~utiŋ.
S.TRANSL: I shoot fish with a spear.

S.FORM: Mafana' kiso tano pana'en a miadop haw?
S.PHON: mafanaʡ kiso~u tano~u panaʡən a miaɬ~ɮo~up ħaw?
S.FORM: Mafana' kiso tano pana'en a miadop haw?
S.PHON: mafanaʡ kiso~u tano~u panaʡən a miaɬ~ɮo~up ħaw?
S.TRANSL: Do you know how to hunt with a bow and arrow?

S.FORM: O talakal ko sapiadop no mako, olatek miolong to waco kowang a miadop.
S.PHON: o~u taɾakaɾ ko~u sapiaɬ~ɮo~up no~u mako~u, o~uɾatək mio~uɾo~uŋ to~u waʦo~u ko~uwaŋ a miaɬ~ɮo~up.
S.FORM: O talakal ko sapiadop no mako, olatek miolong to waco kowang a miadop.
S.PHON: o~u taɾakaɾ ko~u sapiaɬ~ɮo~up no~u mako~u, o~uɾatək mio~uɾo~uŋ to~u waʦo~u ko~uwaŋ a miaɬ~ɮo~up.
S.TRANSL: 我通常都是用陷阱抓獵物，偶爾也會拿槍帶狗狩獵。
I usually catch my prey with a trap, but occasionally I hunt with a gun and a dog.

S.FORM: o nirakatan no fafoy koni a lalan
S.PHON: o~u nirakatan no~u fafo~uj ko~uni a ɾaɾan
S.FORM: o nirakatan no fafoy koni a lalan
S.PHON: o~u nirakatan no~u fafo~uj ko~uni a ɾaɾan
S.TRANSL: This is the road the boar took.

S.FORM: Ano mafana' kiso?
S.PHON: ano~u mafanaʡ kiso~u?
S.FORM: Ano mafana' kiso?
S.PHON: ano~u mafanaʡ kiso~u?

S.FORM: O salipa' no fafoy koni, mana o nirakatan no fafoy koni a lalan.
S.PHON: o~u saɾipaʡ no~u fafo~uj ko~uni, mana o~u nirakatan no~u fafo~uj ko~uni a ɾaɾan.
S.FORM: O salipa' no fafoy koni, mana o nirakatan no fafoy koni a lalan.
S.PHON: o~u saɾipaʡ no~u fafo~uj ko~uni, mana o~u nirakatan no~u fafo~uj ko~uni a ɾaɾan.
S.TRANSL: 這是山豬的腳印，所以這是山豬所走的路。
These are the footprints of the boar, so this is the path the boar took.

S.FORM: halikien a minengneng to talakal ita, hato ci tamaay to.
S.PHON: ħaɾikiən a minəŋnəŋ to~u taɾakaɾ ita, ħato~u ʦi tamaaj to~u.
S.FORM: halikien a minengneng to talakal ita, hato ci tamaay to.
S.PHON: ħaɾikiən a minəŋnəŋ to~u taɾakaɾ ita, ħato~u ʦi tamaaj to~u.
S.TRANSL: 快去看我們的陷阱，好像抓到獵物了。
Go and see our trap, for it seems that we have caught our prey.

S.FORM: ano Mafana' kiso?
S.PHON: ano~u mafanaʡ kiso~u?
S.FORM: ano Mafana' kiso?
S.PHON: ano~u mafanaʡ kiso~u?

S.FORM: Hato mahanekay no waco, halikien ita tayra a mito'ol.
S.PHON: ħato~u maħanəkaj no~u waʦo~u, ħaɾikiən ita tajra a mito~uʡo~uɾ.
S.FORM: Hato mahanekay no waco, halikien ita tayra a mito'ol.
S.PHON: ħato~u maħanəkaj no~u waʦo~u, ħaɾikiən ita tajra a mito~uʡo~uɾ.
S.TRANSL: 狗好像聞到味道了。我們快跟過去。
The dog seems to have smelled it. Let's follow them.

S.FORM: O manan ko nisangaan iso?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u nisaŋaan iso~u?
S.FORM: O manan ko nisangaan iso?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u nisaŋaan iso~u?
S.TRANSL: 你正在製作的是什麼東西?

S.FORM: O no tanofakelohan a talakal koni sapiadop to edo.
S.PHON: o~u no~u tano~ufakəɾo~uħan a taɾakaɾ ko~uni sapiaɬ~ɮo~up to~u əɬ~ɮo~u.
S.FORM: O no tanofakelohan a talakal koni sapiadop to edo.
S.PHON: o~u no~u tano~ufakəɾo~uħan a taɾakaɾ ko~uni sapiaɬ~ɮo~up to~u əɬ~ɮo~u.
S.TRANSL: 這是石壓式陷阱，用來抓老鼠的。
This is a stone trap, used to catch rats.

S.FORM: O manan ko ni telian iso i tira?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u ni təɾian iso~u i tira?
S.FORM: O manan ko ni telian iso i tira?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u ni təɾian iso~u i tira?
S.TRANSL: 你放在那裡的是什麼東西?
What is that thing you put there?

S.FORM: O kalala a talakal kora, sapiadop to mancel.
S.PHON: o~u kaɾaɾa a taɾakaɾ ko~ura, sapiaɬ~ɮo~up to~u manʦəɾ.
S.FORM: O kalala a talakal kora, sapiadop to mancel.
S.PHON: o~u kaɾaɾa a taɾakaɾ ko~ura, sapiaɬ~ɮo~up to~u manʦəɾ.
S.TRANSL: 那是套腳式繩索陷阱，我們用它來抓山羌。
It was a leg-rigged rope trap, and we used it to catch Shankiang.

S.FORM: Miahowid to palemed no tatoasan, adihay ko tama niyam anini.
S.PHON: miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u paɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u tato~uasan, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u tama nijam anini.

S.PHON: miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u paɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u tato~uasan, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u tama nijam anini.
S.TRANSL: 感謝祖靈賜福，今天我們有很多獵物收獲。
Thanks to the blessing of our ancestors, we had a great harvest today.

S.FORM: Hai, panokayen ita i niyaro' paini to finawlan.
S.PHON: ħai, pano~ukajən ita i nijaro~uʡ paini to~u finawɾan.

S.TRANSL: 是啊!我們帶回部落好好分享吧!
Yeah! Let's take it back to the tribe and share it!

S.FORM: O sowal no 'Amis to pinanowang pakafana'en no singsi kita anini.
S.PHON: o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis to~u pinano~uwaŋ pakafanaʡən no~u siŋsi kita anini.

S.TRANSL: 今天老師要教大家動物的阿美語怎麼說。
I will teach everyone all kinds of animals in Pangcah language today.

S.FORM: O sowal no 'Amis to pinarengw pakafana'en no singsi kita anini.

I will teach everyone all kinds of plants in Pangcah language today.

S.FORM: O sowal no 'Amis to losay pakafana'en no singsi kita anini.

I will teach everyone all kinds of fruits in Pangcah language today.

S.TRANSL: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

S.FORM: O nipalomaan ako kona konga, tanamen a komaen!

S.FORM: Sakoesan sa kona konga.

S.TRANSL: 請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!

S.FORM: Cecayay kiso a mikiloma' haw?

S.FORM: Ira ko cecay to nipa'oripan ako a waco ato cecay a 'ayam, todong to o tamdaw no loma' ako.
S.PHON: ira ko~u ʦəʦaj to~u nipaʡo~uripan ako~u a waʦo~u ato~u ʦəʦaj a ʡajam, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ɾo~umaʡ ako~u.

S.TRANSL: 我還有養一隻狗和一隻鳥，他們也是我的家人。
I also keep a dog and a bird. They are my family.

S.FORM: Ira haca ko cecay to nipa'oripan no mako a ngiyaw, ira ko pinanowang pacafay hay cakalaholac ko 'orip.
S.PHON: ira ħaʦa ko~u ʦəʦaj to~u nipaʡo~uripan no~u mako~u a ŋijaw, ira ko~u pinano~uwaŋ paʦafaj ħaj ʦakaɾaħo~uɾaʦ ko~u ʡo~urip.

S.TRANSL: 我也有養一隻貓，有動物陪伴生活才不會無聊。

S.FORM: Licayen ho ako kiso, pakayni to mi'adopay iraay ko kapaysinan a demak.
S.PHON: ɾiʦajən ħo~u ako~u kiso~u, pakajni to~u miʡaɬ~ɮo~upaj iraaj ko~u kapajsinan a ɬ~ɮəmak.

S.TRANSL: 我想請問你，關於打獵的禁忌。
I would like to ask you about the taboos of hunting.

S.FORM: Caka hakowa ko kafana'an no mako, ano ira ko kafana'an no mako paca'of han to ako kiso.
S.PHON: ʦaka ħako~uwa ko~u kafanaʡan no~u mako~u, ano~u ira ko~u kafanaʡan no~u mako~u paʦaʡo~uf ħan to~u ako~u kiso~u.
S.FORM: Caka hakowa ko kafana'an no mako, ano ira ko kafana'an no mako paca'of han to ako kiso.

S.TRANSL: 我知道的不多，但我能回答的都會回答你。
I don't know much about that, but I will tell you everything I know.

S.FORM: O sapi'adop namo a talakal iraay ko kapaysinan haw?
S.PHON: o~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up namo~u a taɾakaɾ iraaj ko~u kapajsinan ħaw?
S.FORM: O sapi'adop namo a talakal iraay ko kapaysinan haw?
S.PHON: o~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up namo~u a taɾakaɾ iraaj ko~u kapajsinan ħaw?
S.TRANSL: 你們打獵的武器有什麼禁忌嗎?
Do you have any taboos about hunting weapons?

S.FORM: O sapi'adop niyam a talakal, tatiih ko fafahiyan a mitefing.
S.PHON: o~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up nijam a taɾakaɾ, tatiiħ ko~u fafaħijan a mitəfiŋ.
S.FORM: O sapi'adop niyam a talakal, tatiih ko fafahiyan a mitefing.
S.PHON: o~u sapiʡaɬ~ɮo~up nijam a taɾakaɾ, tatiiħ ko~u fafaħijan a mitəfiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我們打獵的武器不可以讓女生碰到。
Our hunting weapons are untouchable to women.

S.FORM: Cowa kanga'ay ko fafahiyan a mi'adop?
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa kaŋaʡaj ko~u fafaħijan a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up?
S.FORM: Cowa kanga'ay ko fafahiyan a mi'adop?
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa kaŋaʡaj ko~u fafaħijan a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up?
S.TRANSL: 那女人可以一起去打獵嗎?
Then, can women go hunting together?

S.FORM: Cowa kanga'ay, tatiih ko fafahiyan a mi'adop.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa kaŋaʡaj, tatiiħ ko~u fafaħijan a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up.
S.FORM: Cowa kanga'ay, tatiih ko fafahiyan a mi'adop.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa kaŋaʡaj, tatiiħ ko~u fafaħijan a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up.
S.TRANSL: 不行，女人也不可以打獵。
No, women cannot go hunting either.

S.FORM: Tamih, awaay to ko miciw i loma', mi'aca ho to miciw.
S.PHON: tamiħ, awaaj to~u ko~u miʦiw i ɾo~umaʡ, miʡaʦa ħo~u to~u miʦiw.
S.FORM: Tamih, awaay to ko miciw i loma', mi'aca ho to miciw.
S.PHON: tamiħ, awaaj to~u ko~u miʦiw i ɾo~umaʡ, miʡaʦa ħo~u to~u miʦiw.
S.TRANSL: Tamih，家裡沒有米酒了，你去買米酒。
Tamih, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

S.FORM: Iraay ho i cawka ko cecay a talid, hamanay to a mi'aca!
S.PHON: iraaj ħo~u i ʦawka ko~u ʦəʦaj a taɾiɬ~ɮ, ħamanaj to~u a miʡaʦa!
S.FORM: Iraay ho i cawka ko cecay a talid, hamanay to a mi'aca!
S.PHON: iraaj ħo~u i ʦawka ko~u ʦəʦaj a taɾiɬ~ɮ, ħamanaj to~u a miʡaʦa!
S.TRANSL: 廚房裡還有一瓶，不用買吧!
There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

S.FORM: Cango'ot ko cecay a talid, tosaen a talid ko ni'acaan.
S.PHON: ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut ko~u ʦəʦaj a taɾiɬ~ɮ, to~usaən a taɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u niʡaʦaan.
S.FORM: Cango'ot ko cecay a talid, tosaen a talid ko ni'acaan.

S.TRANSL: 一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來。
One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

S.FORM: Mami'aca kako to miciw, paliwalay kamo?
S.PHON: mamiʡaʦa kako~u to~u miʦiw, paɾiwaɾaj kamo~u?
S.FORM: Mami'aca kako to miciw, paliwalay kamo?
S.PHON: mamiʡaʦa kako~u to~u miʦiw, paɾiwaɾaj kamo~u?
S.TRANSL: 我要買米酒，你們有賣嗎?
I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

S.FORM: Iraay! pina ko 'a'acaen no miso?
S.PHON: iraaj! pina ko~u ʡaʡaʦaən no~u miso~u?
S.FORM: Iraay! pina ko 'a'acaen no miso?
S.PHON: iraaj! pina ko~u ʡaʡaʦaən no~u miso~u?
S.TRANSL: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

S.FORM: Tosa a talid ko 'a'acaen no mako, mi'aca ho to cecay tafo a felac.
S.PHON: to~usa a taɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u ʡaʡaʦaən no~u mako~u, miʡaʦa ħo~u to~u ʦəʦaj tafo~u a fəɾaʦ.

S.TRANSL: 我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

S.FORM: Ini ko felac, o maan ho ko 'a'acaen iso?
S.PHON: ini ko~u fəɾaʦ, o~u maan ħo~u ko~u ʡaʡaʦaən iso~u?

S.TRANSL: 米在這裡，你還要買什麼嗎?
Here is the rice, what else do you need?

S.FORM: Mami'aca ho kako to fita'ol, iraay ko namo?

S.TRANSL: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

S.FORM: Maeminay to a mapaliwal ko fita'ol niyam.
S.PHON: maəminaj to~u a mapaɾiwaɾ ko~u fitaʡo~uɾ nijam.

S.FORM: Masamaanay ko 'a'acaen no miso?

S.FORM: Aling, talacowaay kiso i sawni? Mionto kiso?

S.FORM: Cowa, patadoay kako cifofoan a mi'aca to dateng.

S.FORM: Cato, o mami'aca to riko' kako.

S.FORM: Tosa polo' ko cecay a lolong.

S.FORM: Pina ko 'aca nona konga?
S.PHON: pina ko~u ʡaʦa no~una ko~uŋa?
S.FORM: Pina ko 'aca nona konga?
S.PHON: pina ko~u ʡaʦa no~una ko~uŋa?

S.FORM: Cecay a tingting tolo polo' ko 'aca nona konga.

S.FORM: Dadada, pafelien kako toya cecay tingting a konga ato dateng.

S.FORM: Awaay ko mako, o niPanay konini.

S.TRANSL: Kacaw's coat is the same as yours.

S.FORM: O kohetingay a kafang ko niKacaw, cowa kahecad ko cengel niyam.
S.PHON: o~u ko~uħətiŋaj a kafaŋ ko~u nikaʦaw, ʦo~uwa kaħəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦəŋəɾ nijam.
S.FORM: O kohetingay a kafang ko niKacaw, cowa kahecad ko cengel niyam.
S.PHON: o~u ko~uħətiŋaj a kafaŋ ko~u nikaʦaw, ʦo~uwa kaħəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦəŋəɾ nijam.
S.TRANSL: 他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
His coat is black, so our colors are different.

S.FORM: Panay, micaliway to payci niKacaw kiso?
S.PHON: panaj, miʦaɾiwaj to~u pajʦi nikaʦaw kiso~u?
S.FORM: Panay, micaliway to payci niKacaw kiso?
S.PHON: panaj, miʦaɾiwaj to~u pajʦi nikaʦaw kiso~u?
S.TRANSL: Panay, did you borrow money from Kacaw?

S.FORM: Hai, o papatikolen no mako cingra anini, matawalay no mako a mihawikid ko payci.
S.PHON: ħai, o~u papatiko~uɾən no~u mako~u ʦiŋra anini, matawaɾaj no~u mako~u a miħawikiɬ~ɮ ko~u pajʦi.
S.FORM: Hai, o papatikolen no mako cingra anini, matawalay no mako a mihawikid ko payci.
S.PHON: ħai, o~u papatiko~uɾən no~u mako~u ʦiŋra anini, matawaɾaj no~u mako~u a miħawikiɬ~ɮ ko~u pajʦi.
S.TRANSL: 是的，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

S.FORM: Ya hacowaen to iso a patikol?
S.PHON: ja ħaʦo~uwaən to~u iso~u a patiko~uɾ?
S.FORM: Ya hacowaen to iso a patikol?
S.PHON: ja ħaʦo~uwaən to~u iso~u a patiko~uɾ?
S.TRANSL: Then, when will you return the money?

S.FORM: Anocila hanto ako a patikol cingra.
S.PHON: ano~uʦiɾa ħanto~u ako~u a patiko~uɾ ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: Anocila hanto ako a patikol cingra.
S.PHON: ano~uʦiɾa ħanto~u ako~u a patiko~uɾ ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: I will return to him tomorrow.

S.FORM: Hayda, sowal hanto ako ciKacaw.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa, so~uwaɾ ħanto~u ako~u ʦikaʦaw.
S.FORM: Hayda, sowal hanto ako ciKacaw.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa, so~uwaɾ ħanto~u ako~u ʦikaʦaw.
S.TRANSL: Okay, I will tell Kacaw for you.

S.FORM: O fakeloh ko sapitalakal to 'edo a mi'enec, roma i, o wa'il ko sapitalakal to tolok a milamec, matatodongay haenen.
S.PHON: o~u fakəɾo~uħ ko~u sapitaɾakaɾ to~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u a miʡənəʦ, ro~uma i, o~u waʡiɾ ko~u sapitaɾakaɾ to~u to~uɾo~uk a miɾaməʦ, matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ħaənən.
S.FORM: O fakeloh ko sapitalakal to 'edo a mi'enec, roma i, o wa'il ko sapitalakal to tolok a milamec, matatodongay haenen.
S.PHON: o~u fakəɾo~uħ ko~u sapitaɾakaɾ to~u ʡəɬ~ɮo~u a miʡənəʦ, ro~uma i, o~u waʡiɾ ko~u sapitaɾakaɾ to~u to~uɾo~uk a miɾaməʦ, matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ħaənən.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠應該要⽤⽯壓式陷阱抓，雉雞應該要⽤套頸式陷阱抓，這樣才對。
It is correct to catch mice through rangay and catch bamboo partridges through qjiulang.

S.FORM: Mahaenay han, mararaway ko demak ako! salaw awa ko ma'adpay no mako.
S.PHON: maħaənaj ħan, mararawaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ako~u! saɾaw awa ko~u maʡaɬ~ɮpaj no~u mako~u.
S.FORM: Mahaenay han, mararaway ko demak ako! salaw awa ko ma'adpay no mako.
S.PHON: maħaənaj ħan, mararawaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ako~u! saɾaw awa ko~u maʡaɬ~ɮpaj no~u mako~u.
S.TRANSL: 原來是這樣，我都搞錯了！難怪我都抓不到。
No wonder! I am mistaken and that's why I cannot catch any of them.

S.FORM: Liyawen haca ako pakafana' kiso misanga' to talakal.
S.PHON: ɾijawən ħaʦa ako~u pakafanaʡ kiso~u misaŋaʡ to~u taɾakaɾ.
S.FORM: Liyawen haca ako pakafana' kiso misanga' to talakal.
S.PHON: ɾijawən ħaʦa ako~u pakafanaʡ kiso~u misaŋaʡ to~u taɾakaɾ.
S.TRANSL: 那我再教你怎麼製作這兩種陷阱。
Then I will teach you how to set up these two traps.

S.FORM: wata! kahemekan to! Ano miliyaw mi'adop haenen to ako a mitalakal nga' citama'.
S.PHON: wata! kaħəməkan to~u! ano~u miɾijaw miʡaɬ~ɮo~up ħaənən to~u ako~u a mitaɾakaɾ ŋaʡ ʦitamaʡ.
S.FORM: wata! kahemekan to! Ano miliyaw mi'adop haenen to ako a mitalakal nga' citama'.
S.PHON: wata! kaħəməkan to~u! ano~u miɾijaw miʡaɬ~ɮo~up ħaənən to~u ako~u a mitaɾakaɾ ŋaʡ ʦitamaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 好啊！太棒了!這樣我以後就會抓到獵物了。
Great! I will be able to catch the prey in the future.

S.FORM: Alaen ko kawkaw ikofaw, tayra kita i omah nifaliw to semot, 'akawangay to ko semot iomah.
S.PHON: aɾaən ko~u kawkaw iko~ufaw, tajra kita i o~umaħ nifaɾiw to~u səmo~ut, ʡakawaŋaj to~u ko~u səmo~ut io~umaħ.
S.FORM: Alaen ko kawkaw ikofaw, tayra kita i omah nifaliw to semot, 'akawangay to ko semot iomah.
S.PHON: aɾaən ko~u kawkaw iko~ufaw, tajra kita i o~umaħ nifaɾiw to~u səmo~ut, ʡakawaŋaj to~u ko~u səmo~ut io~umaħ.
S.TRANSL: 去倉庫拿鐮刀，我們去田裡砍草，田裡的草太高了。
Go to the warehouse to get the sickle, we go to the field to cut the grass, the grass in the field is too high.

S.FORM: I cowaan miteli ko kawkaw?
S.PHON: i ʦo~uwaan mitəɾi ko~u kawkaw?
S.FORM: I cowaan miteli ko kawkaw?
S.PHON: i ʦo~uwaan mitəɾi ko~u kawkaw?

S.FORM: Itiraay ifati'ian no tanomal, comod sa kiso ma'araw to.
S.PHON: itiraaj ifatiʡian no~u tano~umaɾ, ʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ sa kiso~u maʡaraw to~u.
S.FORM: Itiraay ifati'ian no tanomal, comod sa kiso ma'araw to.
S.PHON: itiraaj ifatiʡian no~u tano~umaɾ, ʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ sa kiso~u maʡaraw to~u.
S.TRANSL: 在圓簍的旁邊，你進去倉庫就會看到了。
It is next to the round basket. You will see it when you enter the warehouse.

S.FORM: Na'onen miala, cihinangay ko kawkaw.
S.PHON: naʡo~unən miaɾa, ʦiħinaŋaj ko~u kawkaw.
S.FORM: Na'onen miala, cihinangay ko kawkaw.
S.PHON: naʡo~unən miaɾa, ʦiħinaŋaj ko~u kawkaw.
S.TRANSL: Be careful and don't get hurt. The sickle is very sharp.

S.FORM: Aka ripa'en ko talakal ako!
S.PHON: aka ripaʡən ko~u taɾakaɾ ako~u!
S.FORM: Aka ripa'en ko talakal ako!
S.PHON: aka ripaʡən ko~u taɾakaɾ ako~u!

S.FORM: I cowaan iso miteli ko talakal?
S.PHON: i ʦo~uwaan iso~u mitəɾi ko~u taɾakaɾ?
S.FORM: I cowaan iso miteli ko talakal?
S.PHON: i ʦo~uwaan iso~u mitəɾi ko~u taɾakaɾ?

S.FORM: I laeno no kilang a telien no mako ko talakal.
S.PHON: i ɾaəno~u no~u kiɾaŋ a təɾiən no~u mako~u ko~u taɾakaɾ.
S.FORM: I laeno no kilang a telien no mako ko talakal.
S.PHON: i ɾaəno~u no~u kiɾaŋ a təɾiən no~u mako~u ko~u taɾakaɾ.
S.TRANSL: 我的陷阱在那棵樹的下面。
My trap is under that tree.

S.FORM: Mana cakatawal iso?
S.PHON: mana ʦakatawaɾ iso~u?
S.FORM: Mana cakatawal iso?
S.PHON: mana ʦakatawaɾ iso~u?

S.FORM: Ira itira ko nikonisan ako, mafana' kako to icowaan ako miteli ko talakal.
S.PHON: ira itira ko~u niko~unisan ako~u, mafanaʡ kako~u to~u iʦo~uwaan ako~u mitəɾi ko~u taɾakaɾ.
S.FORM: Ira itira ko nikonisan ako, mafana' kako to icowaan ako miteli ko talakal.
S.PHON: ira itira ko~u niko~unisan ako~u, mafanaʡ kako~u to~u iʦo~uwaan ako~u mitəɾi ko~u taɾakaɾ.
S.TRANSL: 我在這邊有做記號，我知道我的陷阱在哪裡。
I make a mark here, so I know where my trap is.

S.FORM: O foefo koni, telien no mita i lawac no 'alo a mifoting.
S.PHON: o~u fo~uəfo~u ko~uni, təɾiən no~u mita i ɾawaʦ no~u ʡaɾo~u a mifo~utiŋ.
S.FORM: O foefo koni, telien no mita i lawac no 'alo a mifoting.
S.PHON: o~u fo~uəfo~u ko~uni, təɾiən no~u mita i ɾawaʦ no~u ʡaɾo~u a mifo~utiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 這是魚筌，我們放在溪邊捕魚。
This is a fish trap which we put beside the river for fishing.

S.FORM: Awaay itira ko foefo niyam, o pacemot ko sapifoting niyam.
S.PHON: awaaj itira ko~u fo~uəfo~u nijam, o~u paʦəmo~ut ko~u sapifo~utiŋ nijam.
S.FORM: Awaay itira ko foefo niyam, o pacemot ko sapifoting niyam.
S.PHON: awaaj itira ko~u fo~uəfo~u nijam, o~u paʦəmo~ut ko~u sapifo~utiŋ nijam.
S.TRANSL: 我們那邊沒有魚筌，我們都用釣竿抓魚。
We don't have any fish traps there, so we catch fish with a fishing rod.

S.FORM: Caho pitanam kako a mipacemot, anocila pakafana' han to kako?
S.PHON: ʦaħo~u pitanam kako~u a mipaʦəmo~ut, ano~uʦiɾa pakafanaʡ ħan to~u kako~u?
S.FORM: Caho pitanam kako a mipacemot, anocila pakafana' han to kako?
S.PHON: ʦaħo~u pitanam kako~u a mipaʦəmo~ut, ano~uʦiɾa pakafanaʡ ħan to~u kako~u?
S.TRANSL: 我沒有用過釣竿，你下次教我好嗎?
I have never used a fishing rod before, would you mind teaching me next time?

S.FORM: Hai, anocila malacafay kita a mipacemot.
S.PHON: ħai, ano~uʦiɾa maɾaʦafaj kita a mipaʦəmo~ut.
S.FORM: Hai, anocila malacafay kita a mipacemot.
S.PHON: ħai, ano~uʦiɾa maɾaʦafaj kita a mipaʦəmo~ut.
S.TRANSL: 好啊!我們下次一起去釣魚。
Sure! Let's go fishing together next time.

S.FORM: Liyaw to a romi'ad pakafana' han to ako misanga' to foefoe kiso.
S.PHON: ɾijaw to~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ pakafanaʡ ħan to~u ako~u misaŋaʡ to~u fo~uəfo~uə kiso~u.
S.FORM: Liyaw to a romi'ad pakafana' han to ako misanga' to foefoe kiso.
S.PHON: ɾijaw to~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ pakafanaʡ ħan to~u ako~u misaŋaʡ to~u fo~uəfo~uə kiso~u.
S.TRANSL: I will teach you how to make a fish trap next time.

S.FORM: Tatemikay to ko pacemot iso, mapacemotay to ko foting alatek, halikien a mitengteng.
S.PHON: tatəmikaj to~u ko~u paʦəmo~ut iso~u, mapaʦəmo~utaj to~u ko~u fo~utiŋ aɾatək, ħaɾikiən a mitəŋtəŋ.
S.FORM: Tatemikay to ko pacemot iso, mapacemotay to ko foting alatek, halikien a mitengteng.
S.PHON: tatəmikaj to~u ko~u paʦəmo~ut iso~u, mapaʦəmo~utaj to~u ko~u fo~utiŋ aɾatək, ħaɾikiən a mitəŋtəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 你的釣竿動了，是不是有魚上鉤了!你快拉起來。
Your fishing rod is moving. Isn't the fish on the hook? Pull it up!

S.FORM: Aka ho, ngiyangi sanay ko tamina. Itini sa kako mitengteng to pacemot, patadoen ho kako tayra miala to salil.
S.PHON: aka ħo~u, ŋijaŋi sanaj ko~u tamina. itini sa kako~u mitəŋtəŋ to~u paʦəmo~ut, pataɬ~ɮo~uən ħo~u kako~u tajra miaɾa to~u saɾiɾ.
S.FORM: Aka ho, ngiyangi sanay ko tamina. Itini sa kako mitengteng to pacemot, patadoen ho kako tayra miala to salil.
S.PHON: aka ħo~u, ŋijaŋi sanaj ko~u tamina. itini sa kako~u mitəŋtəŋ to~u paʦəmo~ut, pataɬ~ɮo~uən ħo~u kako~u tajra miaɾa to~u saɾiɾ.
S.TRANSL: 等等，船太搖動了。我在這邊拉釣竿，去那邊幫我拿網子來。
Wait, the ship is rolling heavily. I am here to pull the fishing rod and you should go there to grab me the net.

S.FORM: Tengtengen patayni kora foting, patadoen no mako kiso a mitengteng.
S.PHON: təŋtəŋən patajni ko~ura fo~utiŋ, pataɬ~ɮo~uən no~u mako~u kiso~u a mitəŋtəŋ.
S.FORM: Tengtengen patayni kora foting, patadoen no mako kiso a mitengteng.
S.PHON: təŋtəŋən patajni ko~ura fo~utiŋ, pataɬ~ɮo~uən no~u mako~u kiso~u a mitəŋtəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 你把魚拉到我這邊。我幫妳拉起來。
Pull the fish to my side and I will help you pull it up.

S.FORM: Wata! ka kadofa anini, matomes ko kopid.
S.PHON: wata! ka kaɬ~ɮo~ufa anini, mato~uməs ko~u ko~upiɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: Wata! ka kadofa anini, matomes ko kopid.
S.PHON: wata! ka kaɬ~ɮo~ufa anini, mato~uməs ko~u ko~upiɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 太好了!今天大豐收，魚簍都裝滿了。
Great! It is a bumper crop today with full fish baskets.

S.FORM: Halikien a minokay papalilamen no mita ko salawinawina.
S.PHON: ħaɾikiən a mino~ukaj papaɾiɾamən no~u mita ko~u saɾawinawina.
S.FORM: Halikien a minokay papalilamen no mita ko salawinawina.
S.PHON: ħaɾikiən a mino~ukaj papaɾiɾamən no~u mita ko~u saɾawinawina.
S.TRANSL: 我們快回去跟親戚分享。
Let's go back immediately and share it with everyone.

S.FORM: Tayniay to ko singsi.
S.PHON: tajniaj to~u ko~u siŋsi.
S.FORM: Tayniay to ko singsi.
S.PHON: tajniaj to~u ko~u siŋsi.

S.FORM: Aka to pihalama, kalikien a maro' i kamaro'an.
S.PHON: aka to~u piħaɾama, kaɾikiən a maro~uʡ i kamaro~uʡan.
S.FORM: Aka to pihalama, kalikien a maro' i kamaro'an.
S.PHON: aka to~u piħaɾama, kaɾikiən a maro~uʡ i kamaro~uʡan.
S.TRANSL: 不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.

S.FORM: Kangodoan to, maapacay to kako!
S.PHON: kaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uan to~u, maapaʦaj to~u kako~u!
S.FORM: Kangodoan to, maapacay to kako!
S.PHON: kaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uan to~u, maapaʦaj to~u kako~u!

S.FORM: Kalikien a micomod!
S.PHON: kaɾikiən a miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ!
S.FORM: Kalikien a micomod!
S.PHON: kaɾikiən a miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ!

S.FORM: O sakapian no lipay anini?
S.PHON: o~u sakapian no~u ɾipaj anini?
S.FORM: O sakapian no lipay anini?
S.PHON: o~u sakapian no~u ɾipaj anini?

S.FORM: O sakalima no lipay anini, pahanhan to anocila, ata malacafay a mihalama!
S.PHON: o~u sakaɾima no~u ɾipaj anini, paħanħan to~u ano~uʦiɾa, ata maɾaʦafaj a miħaɾama!
S.FORM: O sakalima no lipay anini, pahanhan to anocila, ata malacafay a mihalama!
S.PHON: o~u sakaɾima no~u ɾipaj anini, paħanħan to~u ano~uʦiɾa, ata maɾaʦafaj a miħaɾama!
S.TRANSL: 今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
It's Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let's go out and play together!

S.FORM: Hayda! tayra kita i 'alo.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa! tajra kita i ʡaɾo~u.
S.FORM: Hayda! tayra kita i 'alo.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa! tajra kita i ʡaɾo~u.
S.TRANSL: Great! Let's go to the riverside.

S.FORM: O sakapina no lipay anocila?
S.PHON: o~u sakapina no~u ɾipaj ano~uʦiɾa?
S.FORM: O sakapina no lipay anocila?
S.PHON: o~u sakapina no~u ɾipaj ano~uʦiɾa?
S.TRANSL: What day will it be tomorrow?

S.FORM: O sakatolo no lipay anocila, mihalama kita to mali to herek no lahok no cila!
S.PHON: o~u sakato~uɾo~u no~u ɾipaj ano~uʦiɾa, miħaɾama kita to~u maɾi to~u ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk no~u ʦiɾa!
S.FORM: O sakatolo no lipay anocila, mihalama kita to mali to herek no lahok no cila!
S.PHON: o~u sakato~uɾo~u no~u ɾipaj ano~uʦiɾa, miħaɾama kita to~u maɾi to~u ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk no~u ʦiɾa!
S.TRANSL: 明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let's go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

S.FORM: Mamimaan kiso anodafak?
S.PHON: mamimaan kiso~u ano~uɬ~ɮafak?
S.FORM: Mamimaan kiso anodafak?
S.PHON: mamimaan kiso~u ano~uɬ~ɮafak?
S.TRANSL: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

S.FORM: O pilipayan anocila, tatayra kako ato wina i kiwkay.
S.PHON: o~u piɾipajan ano~uʦiɾa, tatajra kako~u ato~u wina i kiwkaj.
S.FORM: O pilipayan anocila, tatayra kako ato wina i kiwkay.
S.PHON: o~u piɾipajan ano~uʦiɾa, tatajra kako~u ato~u wina i kiwkaj.
S.TRANSL: 明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.

S.FORM: Mamaanay kiso?
S.PHON: mamaanaj kiso~u?

S.PHON: mamaanaj kiso~u?

S.FORM: Sakaota'aw sanay kako, tayra ho kako i tata'ian.
S.PHON: sakao~utaʡaw sanaj kako~u, tajra ħo~u kako~u i tataʡian.
S.FORM: Sakaota'aw sanay kako, tayra ho kako i tata'ian.
S.PHON: sakao~utaʡaw sanaj kako~u, tajra ħo~u kako~u i tataʡian.
S.TRANSL: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.

S.FORM: Sinawar sa ko fongoh ako.
S.PHON: sinawar sa ko~u fo~uŋo~uħ ako~u.
S.FORM: Sinawar sa ko fongoh ako.
S.PHON: sinawar sa ko~u fo~uŋo~uħ ako~u.

S.FORM: Hinefa han iso a mipasela'.
S.PHON: ħinəfa ħan iso~u a mipasəɾaʡ.
S.FORM: Hinefa han iso a mipasela'.

S.FORM: Singsi, adada ko tiyad ako, tayra ho kako i tata'ian.
S.PHON: siŋsi, aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ko~u tijaɬ~ɮ ako~u, tajra ħo~u kako~u i tataʡian.

S.PHON: mamipasəraʡ to~u, sawni to~u!
S.TRANSL: It's almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

S.TRANSL: 老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。

S.FORM: Hayda, na'onen ko pinokay!

S.TRANSL: Okay, take care and go home.

S.FORM: Iraay ko i lomaay haw?

S.FORM: Ci Kacaw fofo han! halafin cowa to ka'araw kiso, nga'ayay ho kiso?
S.PHON: ʦi kaʦaw fo~ufo~u ħan! ħaɾafin ʦo~uwa to~u kaʡaraw kiso~u, ŋaʡajaj ħo~u kiso~u?

S.TRANSL: 是Kacaw阿公，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
It's Kacaw. I haven't seen you in a while! How have you been?

S.FORM: Tadanga'ayay to, mikilim tisowanan malalicalicay.
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮaŋaʡajaj to~u, mikiɾim tiso~uwanan maɾaɾiʦaɾiʦaj.

S.TRANSL: I'm doing great! I came to chat with you.

S.FORM: Icowaay ko wama iso?
S.PHON: iʦo~uwaaj ko~u wama iso~u?
S.FORM: Icowaay ko wama iso?
S.PHON: iʦo~uwaaj ko~u wama iso~u?

S.FORM: Misafelay i cawka cingra, tahidangen ho ako cingra.

S.TRANSL: 他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
He's in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

S.FORM: Talacowaay ci Panay?

S.FORM: Tayra i pakoko'an cingra milepel to koko'.
S.PHON: tajra i pako~uko~uʡan ʦiŋra miɾəpəɾ to~u ko~uko~uʡ.

S.PHON: tajra i pako~uko~uʡan ʦiŋra miɾəpəɾ to~u ko~uko~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

S.FORM: Fofo, tayniay to kami.
S.PHON: fo~ufo~u, tajniaj to~u kami.
S.FORM: Fofo, tayniay to kami.

S.FORM: Awaay ko fofo namo i loma', i omahan cingra, i loma' saho kamo a mitala to pinokayan ningra.
S.PHON: awaaj ko~u fo~ufo~u namo~u i ɾo~umaʡ, i o~umaħan ʦiŋra, i ɾo~umaʡ saħo~u kamo~u a mitaɾa to~u pino~ukajan niŋra.
S.FORM: Awaay ko fofo namo i loma', i omahan cingra, i loma' saho kamo a mitala to pinokayan ningra.
S.PHON: awaaj ko~u fo~ufo~u namo~u i ɾo~umaʡ, i o~umaħan ʦiŋra, i ɾo~umaʡ saħo~u kamo~u a mitaɾa to~u pino~ukajan niŋra.
S.TRANSL: 你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
Your grandfather is not at home. He's in the field. Wait for him to come back.

S.FORM: Tayniay kiso faki!
S.PHON: tajniaj kiso~u faki!
S.FORM: Tayniay kiso faki!
S.PHON: tajniaj kiso~u faki!

S.FORM: Halafi:nay to caka sasi'araw, 'aka:wangay to kiso.
S.PHON: ħaɾafi:naj to~u ʦaka sasiʡaraw, ʡaka:waŋaj to~u kiso~u.
S.FORM: Halafi:nay to caka sasi'araw, 'aka:wangay to kiso.
S.PHON: ħaɾafi:naj to~u ʦaka sasiʡaraw, ʡaka:waŋaj to~u kiso~u.
S.TRANSL: I haven't seen you in a while. You've grown taller.

S.FORM: Tadamalipahak a ma'araw ko katayni iso.
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮamaɾipaħak a maʡaraw ko~u katajni iso~u.
S.FORM: Tadamalipahak a ma'araw ko katayni iso.
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮamaɾipaħak a maʡaraw ko~u katajni iso~u.
S.TRANSL: It's so good to see you.

S.FORM: O sapafeli i tomowanan koni a onglay, na'engen tayra i pinsiyang.
S.PHON: o~u sapafəɾi i to~umo~uwanan ko~uni a o~uŋɾaj, naʡəŋən tajra i pinsijaŋ.
S.FORM: O sapafeli i tomowanan koni a onglay, na'engen tayra i pinsiyang.
S.PHON: o~u sapafəɾi i to~umo~uwanan ko~uni a o~uŋɾaj, naʡəŋən tajra i pinsijaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
Here's a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

S.FORM: Halafin cowa to katayni, tahidangen ako ko 'alomanay mapolong a mitaheka.
S.PHON: ħaɾafin ʦo~uwa to~u katajni, taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ako~u ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj mapo~uɾo~uŋ a mitaħəka.
S.FORM: Halafin cowa to katayni, tahidangen ako ko 'alomanay mapolong a mitaheka.
S.PHON: ħaɾafin ʦo~uwa to~u katajni, taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ako~u ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj mapo~uɾo~uŋ a mitaħəka.
S.TRANSL: 這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
It's been a while. Let's have a meal together.

S.FORM: Hamaan to malifot, o ociya ko nga'ayay, tayni i palafangan malalicay ho kita.
S.PHON: ħamaan to~u maɾifo~ut, o~u o~uʦija ko~u ŋaʡajaj, tajni i paɾafaŋan maɾaɾiʦaj ħo~u kita.
S.FORM: Hamaan to malifot, o ociya ko nga'ayay, tayni i palafangan malalicay ho kita.
S.PHON: ħamaan to~u maɾifo~ut, o~u o~uʦija ko~u ŋaʡajaj, tajni i paɾafaŋan maɾaɾiʦaj ħo~u kita.
S.TRANSL: 不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
No need to bother. I'll just have tea. Let's sit in the living room and chat.

S.FORM: Ko'iday ko pipatala iso, maminokay to kako.
S.PHON: ko~uʡiɬ~ɮaj ko~u pipataɾa iso~u, mamino~ukaj to~u kako~u.
S.FORM: Ko'iday ko pipatala iso, maminokay to kako.
S.PHON: ko~uʡiɬ~ɮaj ko~u pipataɾa iso~u, mamino~ukaj to~u kako~u.
S.TRANSL: 謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

S.FORM: Matokaday to kona koko', panokayen cedeng han ko kakomaen.
S.PHON: mato~ukaɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~una ko~uko~uʡ, pano~ukajən ʦəɬ~ɮəŋ ħan ko~u kako~umaən.
S.FORM: Matokaday to kona koko', panokayen cedeng han ko kakomaen.
S.PHON: mato~ukaɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~una ko~uko~uʡ, pano~ukajən ʦəɬ~ɮəŋ ħan ko~u kako~umaən.
S.TRANSL: 這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.

S.FORM: Manga'ay masaso'araw ho kita to anocila a helek no lahok han?
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj masaso~uʡaraw ħo~u kita to~u ano~uʦiɾa a ħəɾək no~u ɾaħo~uk ħan?
S.FORM: Manga'ay masaso'araw ho kita to anocila a helek no lahok han?
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj masaso~uʡaraw ħo~u kita to~u ano~uʦiɾa a ħəɾək no~u ɾaħo~uk ħan?
S.TRANSL: 我和您約明天下午好嗎?
Can I make an appointment with you tomorrow afternoon?

S.FORM: Manga'ay to, icowa kita malalitemoh?
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj to~u, iʦo~uwa kita maɾaɾitəmo~uħ?
S.FORM: Manga'ay to, icowa kita malalitemoh?
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj to~u, iʦo~uwa kita maɾaɾitəmo~uħ?

S.FORM: Manga'ay i pitakcian kita haw? wa mamilu-ing kita.
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj i pitakʦian kita ħaw? wa mamiɾu-iŋ kita.
S.FORM: Manga'ay i pitakcian kita haw? wa mamiloing kita.
S.PHON: maŋaʡaj i pitakʦian kita ħaw? wa mamiɾo~u-iŋ kita.
S.TRANSL: 我們約學校好嗎?我們要錄影。
How about meeting at school? We need to shoot a video.

S.FORM: I sefi sa mamanay, wa mamica'edong to losid a tayra kako.
S.PHON: i səfi sa mamanaj, wa mamiʦaʡəɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ɾo~usiɬ~ɮ a tajra kako~u.
S.FORM: I sefi sa mamanay, wa mamica'edong to losid a tayra kako.
S.PHON: i səfi sa mamanaj, wa mamiʦaʡəɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ɾo~usiɬ~ɮ a tajra kako~u.
S.TRANSL: 那去聚會所好了，我會穿族服去。
Then let's go to the community center. I'll wear folk costume.

S.FORM: Maka:pah ko kafocerak no congiliw no sakola no niyaro' niyam, kafocerakan no congiliw tayni sato a mikilim i takowanan.
S.PHON: maka:paħ ko~u kafo~uʦərak no~u ʦo~uŋiɾiw no~u sako~uɾa no~u nijaro~uʡ nijam, kafo~uʦərakan no~u ʦo~uŋiɾiw tajni sato~u a mikiɾim i tako~uwanan.
S.FORM: Maka:pah ko kafocerak no congiliw no sakola no niyaro' niyam, kafocerakan no congiliw tayni sato a mikilim i takowanan.
S.PHON: maka:paħ ko~u kafo~uʦərak no~u ʦo~uŋiɾiw no~u sako~uɾa no~u nijaro~uʡ nijam, kafo~uʦərakan no~u ʦo~uŋiɾiw tajni sato~u a mikiɾim i tako~uwanan.
S.TRANSL: 我們部落的櫻花盛開很漂亮。等花開的時候你來找我吧!
The cherry blossoms in our tribe are beautiful when they bloom. Come find me when the flowers bloom!

S.FORM: Anohatira tahira ho i kacanglahan, halafin tato!
S.PHON: ano~uħatira taħira ħo~u i kaʦaŋɾaħan, ħaɾafin tato~u!
S.FORM: Anohatira tahira ho i kacanglahan, halafin tato!
S.PHON: ano~uħatira taħira ħo~u i kaʦaŋɾaħan, ħaɾafin tato~u!
S.TRANSL: 那要等到春天，太晚了吧!
That would have to wait until spring. It's too late, isn't it?

S.FORM: Mahaen i, pikiloma'an sato ko katayni iso.
S.PHON: maħaən i, pikiɾo~umaʡan sato~u ko~u katajni iso~u.
S.FORM: Mahaen i, pikiloma'an sato ko katayni iso.
S.PHON: maħaən i, pikiɾo~umaʡan sato~u ko~u katajni iso~u.
S.TRANSL: 那你豐年祭的時候來吧!
Then come during our Harvest Festival!

S.FORM: Hayda, hinatala han to ako.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa, ħinataɾa ħan to~u ako~u.
S.FORM: Hayda, hinatala han to ako.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa, ħinataɾa ħan to~u ako~u.
S.TRANSL: Alright! I'm looking forward to it!

S.FORM: Milicay ho tisowanan, hano patatikol a malinah tayni i niyaro' kiso?
S.PHON: miɾiʦaj ħo~u tiso~uwanan, ħano~u patatiko~uɾ a maɾinaħ tajni i nijaro~uʡ kiso~u?
S.FORM: Milicay ho tisowanan, hano patatikol a malinah tayni i niyaro' kiso?
S.PHON: miɾiʦaj ħo~u tiso~uwanan, ħano~u patatiko~uɾ a maɾinaħ tajni i nijaro~uʡ kiso~u?
S.TRANSL: 請問你為甚麼要搬回部落生活?
May I ask why you decided to move back to the tribe?

S.FORM: Wa mamalasingsi ko kapinokay no mako.
S.PHON: wa mamaɾasiŋsi ko~u kapino~ukaj no~u mako~u.
S.FORM: Wa mamalasingsi ko kapinokay no mako.
S.PHON: wa mamaɾasiŋsi ko~u kapino~ukaj no~u mako~u.
S.TRANSL: I want to return to teach at the local school.

S.FORM: Hano caka i tokay a malasingsi?
S.PHON: ħano~u ʦaka i to~ukaj a maɾasiŋsi?
S.FORM: Hano caka i tokay a malasingsi?
S.PHON: ħano~u ʦaka i to~ukaj a maɾasiŋsi?
S.TRANSL: Why not teach in the city?

S.FORM: Samanen ma'ilol kako to niyaro' ako, nanay ira ko sapipacoay to riyaro'an.
S.PHON: samanən maʡiɾo~uɾ kako~u to~u nijaro~uʡ ako~u, nanaj ira ko~u sapipaʦo~uaj to~u rijaro~uʡan.
S.FORM: Samanen ma'ilol kako to niyaro' ako, nanay ira ko sapipacoay to riyaro'an.
S.PHON: samanən maʡiɾo~uɾ kako~u to~u nijaro~uʡ ako~u, nanaj ira ko~u sapipaʦo~uaj to~u rijaro~uʡan.
S.TRANSL: 因為我懷念我的故鄉，也希望能回饋部落。
Because I miss my hometown and I also want to give back to the tribe.

S.FORM: Tadamafana' kiso a mitenooy, o cima to ko pasifana'ay i kisowanan?
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮamafanaʡ kiso~u a mitəno~uo~uj, o~u ʦima to~u ko~u pasifanaʡaj i kiso~uwanan?
S.FORM: Tadamafana' kiso a mitenooy, o cima to ko pasifana'ay i kisowanan?
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮamafanaʡ kiso~u a mitəno~uo~uj, o~u ʦima to~u ko~u pasifanaʡaj i kiso~uwanan?
S.TRANSL: 你很會織布，是誰教你的?
You're very skilled at weaving, who taught you?

S.FORM: Ci fofo ako, i niyaro' niyam cingra ko mafana'ay a mitenooy.
S.PHON: ʦi fo~ufo~u ako~u, i nijaro~uʡ nijam ʦiŋra ko~u mafanaʡaj a mitəno~uo~uj.
S.FORM: Ci fofo ako, i niyaro' niyam cingra ko mafana'ay a mitenooy.
S.PHON: ʦi fo~ufo~u ako~u, i nijaro~uʡ nijam ʦiŋra ko~u mafanaʡaj a mitəno~uo~uj.
S.TRANSL: 是我的奶奶，她是我們部落最會織布的人。
It was my grandmother, she is the most skilled weaver in our tribe.

S.FORM: Mana sapinanamaw kiso a mitenooy?
S.PHON: mana sapinanamaw kiso~u a mitəno~uo~uj?
S.FORM: Mana sapinanamaw kiso a mitenooy?
S.PHON: mana sapinanamaw kiso~u a mitəno~uo~uj?
S.TRANSL: How did you develop an interest in learning weaving?

S.FORM: O mitenooyay ko serangawan ita, mangalay midotoc to serangawan kako.
S.PHON: o~u mitəno~uo~ujaj ko~u səraŋawan ita, maŋaɾaj miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u səraŋawan kako~u.
S.FORM: O mitenooyay ko serangawan ita, mangalay midotoc to serangawan kako.
S.PHON: o~u mitəno~uo~ujaj ko~u səraŋawan ita, maŋaɾaj miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u səraŋawan kako~u.
S.TRANSL: 織布是我們的文化，我想要讓文化延續。
Weaving is a part of our culture, and I want to ensure its continuity.

S.FORM: Nga'ayay a kaenen koni a ^epah.
S.PHON: ŋaʡajaj a kaənən ko~uni a ʔəpaħ.
S.FORM: Nga'ayay a kaenen koni a ^epah.
S.PHON: ŋaʡajaj a kaənən ko~uni a ʔəpaħ.

S.FORM: O niyah a misa^epahan yo!
S.PHON: o~u nijaħ a misaʔəpaħan jo~u!
S.FORM: O niyah a misa^epahan yo!
S.PHON: o~u nijaħ a misaʔəpaħan jo~u!

S.FORM: Idahi:ay to kiso, halafinay ko pisa^epah haw?
S.PHON: iɬ~ɮaħi:aj to~u kiso~u, ħaɾafinaj ko~u pisaʔəpaħ ħaw?
S.FORM: Idahi:ay to kiso, halafinay ko pisa^epah haw?
S.PHON: iɬ~ɮaħi:aj to~u kiso~u, ħaɾafinaj ko~u pisaʔəpaħ ħaw?
S.TRANSL: 你真厲害，這要釀很久嗎?
You're really talented. Does it take a long time to make?

S.FORM: Caka halafin, todong cecay a lipay nga'ayay to, i'ayaw rahkaden ho ko ko^tengay a malahakhak, nga, pacamolen to tamod samadahen a mitiyil, maedeng to paro han to i koreng.
S.PHON: ʦaka ħaɾafin, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦəʦaj a ɾipaj ŋaʡajaj to~u, iʡajaw raħkaɬ~ɮən ħo~u ko~u ko~uʔtəŋaj a maɾaħakħak, ŋa, paʦamo~uɾən to~u tamo~uɬ~ɮ samaɬ~ɮaħən a mitijiɾ, maəɬ~ɮəŋ to~u paro~u ħan to~u i ko~urəŋ.
S.FORM: Caka halafin, todong cecay a lipay nga'ayay to, i'ayaw rahkaden ho ko ko^tengay a malahakhak, nga, pacamolen to tamod samadahen a mitiyil, maedeng to paro han to i koreng.
S.PHON: ʦaka ħaɾafin, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦəʦaj a ɾipaj ŋaʡajaj to~u, iʡajaw raħkaɬ~ɮən ħo~u ko~u ko~uʔtəŋaj a maɾaħakħak, ŋa, paʦamo~uɾən to~u tamo~uɬ~ɮ samaɬ~ɮaħən a mitijiɾ, maəɬ~ɮəŋ to~u paro~u ħan to~u i ko~urəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 不用，大約一周就好了。把糯米先蒸熟，再加入酒麴一起拌勻，就可以裝到甕裡了。
No, it only takes about a week. After steaming the sticky rice and white rice, we mix it with yeast powder, and then it can be stored in a jar.

S.FORM: O maanmaan ko mipa'acaan iso?
S.PHON: o~u maanmaan ko~u mipaʡaʦaan iso~u?
S.FORM: O maanmaan ko mipa'acaan iso?
S.PHON: o~u maanmaan ko~u mipaʡaʦaan iso~u?

S.FORM: Ira ini ko kamamoday ato lokiyo, sahoto ono niyamay a mipalomaan!
S.PHON: ira ini ko~u kamamo~uɬ~ɮaj ato~u ɾo~ukijo~u, saħo~uto~u o~uno~u nijamaj a mipaɾo~umaan!
S.FORM: Ira ini ko kamamoday ato lokiyo, sahoto ono niyamay a mipalomaan!
S.PHON: ira ini ko~u kamamo~uɬ~ɮaj ato~u ɾo~ukijo~u, saħo~uto~u o~uno~u nijamaj a mipaɾo~umaan!
S.TRANSL: 我這裡有辣椒和蕗蕎，都是我自己種的喔!
I have chili and lokiy, both grown by myself!

S.FORM: Ano tosa han ko mi'acaan, wa pina ko 'aca?
S.PHON: ano~u to~usa ħan ko~u miʡaʦaan, wa pina ko~u ʡaʦa?
S.FORM: Ano tosa han ko mi'acaan, wa pina ko 'aca?
S.PHON: ano~u to~usa ħan ko~u miʡaʦaan, wa pina ko~u ʡaʦa?

S.FORM: Tosa so'ot ira ko lima polo' a lomo'odan
S.PHON: to~usa so~uʡo~ut ira ko~u ɾima po~uɾo~uʡ a ɾo~umo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮan
S.FORM: Tosa so'ot ira ko lima polo' a lomo'odan
S.PHON: to~usa so~uʡo~ut ira ko~u ɾima po~uɾo~uʡ a ɾo~umo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮan

S.FORM: Maolahay kako toni a riko', pina ko 'aca?
S.PHON: mao~uɾaħaj kako~u to~uni a riko~uʡ, pina ko~u ʡaʦa?
S.FORM: Maolahay kako toni a riko', pina ko 'aca?
S.PHON: mao~uɾaħaj kako~u to~uni a riko~uʡ, pina ko~u ʡaʦa?
S.TRANSL: 我喜歡這件衣服，多少錢?
I like this piece of clothing. How much is it?

S.FORM: Lima so'ot a lomo'od konini.
S.PHON: ɾima so~uʡo~ut a ɾo~umo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮ ko~unini.
S.FORM: Lima so'ot a lomo'od konini.
S.PHON: ɾima so~uʡo~ut a ɾo~umo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮ ko~unini.

S.FORM: 'Atekakay tato, sakaemeden ko miming mamanay?
S.PHON: ʡatəkakaj tato~u, sakaəməɬ~ɮən ko~u mimiŋ mamanaj?
S.FORM: 'Atekakay tato, sakaemeden ko miming mamanay?
S.PHON: ʡatəkakaj tato~u, sakaəməɬ~ɮən ko~u mimiŋ mamanaj?
S.TRANSL: It's too expensive. Can't you lower the price a bit?

S.FORM: cato:, ano lowanen mamasipon to kako.
S.PHON: ʦato~u:, ano~u ɾo~uwanən mamasipo~un to~u kako~u.
S.FORM: cato:, ano lowanen mamasipon to kako.
S.PHON: ʦato~u:, ano~u ɾo~uwanən mamasipo~un to~u kako~u.
S.TRANSL: No, if I lower it further, I'll lose money.

S.FORM: Anohatira, ora kohetingay a riko' ko 'a'acaen ako.
S.PHON: ano~uħatira, o~ura ko~uħətiŋaj a riko~uʡ ko~u ʡaʡaʦaən ako~u.
S.FORM: Anohatira, ora kohetingay a riko' ko 'a'acaen ako.
S.PHON: ano~uħatira, o~ura ko~uħətiŋaj a riko~uʡ ko~u ʡaʡaʦaən ako~u.
S.TRANSL: 好吧!那我要一件黑色的衣服。
Alright then, I'll take a black piece of clothing.

S.FORM: Oni a po'ot ato dangah ko 'acaen ako.
S.PHON: o~uni a po~uʡo~ut ato~u ɬ~ɮaŋaħ ko~u ʡaʦaən ako~u.
S.FORM: Oni a po'ot ato dangah ko 'acaen ako.
S.PHON: o~uni a po~uʡo~ut ato~u ɬ~ɮaŋaħ ko~u ʡaʦaən ako~u.
S.TRANSL: 我要這把刀和這個鍋子。
I want this knife and this pot.

S.FORM: Tosa ca'ol a limo'od, ono nakamayan no mako a misanga'an koni, malalid ko pitatatiw cowa ho kapiciw.
S.PHON: to~usa ʦaʡo~uɾ a ɾimo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮ, o~uno~u nakamajan no~u mako~u a misaŋaʡan ko~uni, maɾaɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u pitatatiw ʦo~uwa ħo~u kapiʦiw.
S.FORM: Tosa ca'ol a limo'od, ono nakamayan no mako a misanga'an koni, malalid ko pitatatiw cowa ho kapiciw.
S.PHON: to~usa ʦaʡo~uɾ a ɾimo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮ, o~uno~u nakamajan no~u mako~u a misaŋaʡan ko~uni, maɾaɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u pitatatiw ʦo~uwa ħo~u kapiʦiw.
S.TRANSL: 總共2000元，這是我自己手工打造的，保證可以用很久。
It's a total of 2000 dollars. I handmade these, and they are guaranteed to last a long time.

S.FORM: Siwkayen ako ko widang tayni a mi'aca, manga'ay ka^meden to miming haw?
S.PHON: siwkajən ako~u ko~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ tajni a miʡaʦa, maŋaʡaj kaʔməɬ~ɮən to~u mimiŋ ħaw?
S.FORM: Siwkayen ako ko widang tayni a mi'aca, manga'ay ka^meden to miming haw?
S.PHON: siwkajən ako~u ko~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ tajni a miʡaʦa, maŋaʡaj kaʔməɬ~ɮən to~u mimiŋ ħaw?
S.TRANSL: 我介紹朋友來買，可以再便宜一些嗎?
I'll introduce my friend to buy. Can you give a further discount?

S.FORM: Hayda! Sakaemeden to tosa polo' a pasento ko hamiso.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa! sakaəməɬ~ɮən to~u to~usa po~uɾo~uʡ a pasənto~u ko~u ħamiso~u.
S.FORM: Hayda! Sakaemeden to tosa polo' a pasento ko hamiso.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa! sakaəməɬ~ɮən to~u to~usa po~uɾo~uʡ a pasənto~u ko~u ħamiso~u.
S.TRANSL: Alright! I'll give you a 20% discount.

S.FORM: Atiati: katayni a minengneng, ira ko riko' ato talopong itini.
S.PHON: atiati: katajni a minəŋnəŋ, ira ko~u riko~uʡ ato~u taɾo~upo~uŋ itini.
S.FORM: Atiati: katayni a minengneng, ira ko riko' ato talopong itini.
S.PHON: atiati: katajni a minəŋnəŋ, ira ko~u riko~uʡ ato~u taɾo~upo~uŋ itini.
S.TRANSL: 來看看喔!衣服帽子都有賣。
Come and take a look! We sell clothes and hats.

S.FORM: Licay ho, pina ko 'aca tona riko'?
S.PHON: ɾiʦaj ħo~u, pina ko~u ʡaʦa to~una riko~uʡ?
S.FORM: Licay ho, pina ko 'aca tona riko'?
S.PHON: ɾiʦaj ħo~u, pina ko~u ʡaʦa to~una riko~uʡ?

S.FORM: Tolo so'ot lima polo' a limo'od ko cecay a rikoan, hatolo han ko pi'aca i, cecay ca'ol a limo'odan.
S.PHON: to~uɾo~u so~uʡo~ut ɾima po~uɾo~uʡ a ɾimo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦəʦaj a riko~uan, ħato~uɾo~u ħan ko~u piʡaʦa i, ʦəʦaj ʦaʡo~uɾ a ɾimo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮan.
S.FORM: Tolo so'ot lima polo' a limo'od ko cecay a rikoan, hatolo han ko pi'aca i, cecay ca'ol a limo'odan.
S.PHON: to~uɾo~u so~uʡo~ut ɾima po~uɾo~uʡ a ɾimo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦəʦaj a riko~uan, ħato~uɾo~u ħan ko~u piʡaʦa i, ʦəʦaj ʦaʡo~uɾ a ɾimo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮan.
S.TRANSL: One piece of clothing is 350 dollars, three pieces for 1000 dollars.

S.FORM: Cecay aca ko 'a'acaen ako, pafelien kako to fa^lohay.
S.PHON: ʦəʦaj aʦa ko~u ʡaʡaʦaən ako~u, pafəɾiən kako~u to~u faʔɾo~uħaj.
S.FORM: Cecay aca ko 'a'acaen ako, pafelien kako to fa^lohay.
S.PHON: ʦəʦaj aʦa ko~u ʡaʡaʦaən ako~u, pafəɾiən kako~u to~u faʔɾo~uħaj.
S.TRANSL: 我買一件就好，請給我新的。
I'll just buy one piece, please give me a new one.

S.FORM: Nga'ay ho, wa mami'aca kako to hakhak ato 'imocay a lu-lo.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj ħo~u, wa mamiʡaʦa kako~u to~u ħakħak ato~u ʡimo~uʦaj a ɾu-ɾo~u.
S.FORM: Nga'ay ho, wa mami'aca kako to hakhak ato 'imocay a lolo.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj ħo~u, wa mamiʡaʦa kako~u to~u ħakħak ato~u ʡimo~uʦaj a ɾo~u-ɾo~u.
S.TRANSL: 你好，我想要買糯米飯和山胡椒滷肉。
Hello, I would like to buy sticky rice and braised pork with maqaw pepper.

S.FORM: Mapaliwalay to ko hakhak. ira ho ko tana'ay a tinpong, mangalay kiso a mi'aca?
S.PHON: mapaɾiwaɾaj to~u ko~u ħakħak. ira ħo~u ko~u tanaʡaj a tinpo~uŋ, maŋaɾaj kiso~u a miʡaʦa?
S.FORM: Mapaliwalay to ko hakhak. ira ho ko tana'ay a tinpong, mangalay kiso a mi'aca?
S.PHON: mapaɾiwaɾaj to~u ko~u ħakħak. ira ħo~u ko~u tanaʡaj a tinpo~uŋ, maŋaɾaj kiso~u a miʡaʦa?
S.TRANSL: 飯賣完了。我還有刺蔥油餅，你要買嗎?
The rice is sold out. I have tana pancakes, would you like to buy them?

S.FORM: Hayda, pafeli han kako to cecay, cila to 'aca sato kako to hakhak.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa, pafəɾi ħan kako~u to~u ʦəʦaj, ʦiɾa to~u ʡaʦa sato~u kako~u to~u ħakħak.
S.FORM: Hayda, pafeli han kako to cecay, cila to 'aca sato kako to hakhak.
S.PHON: ħajɬ~ɮa, pafəɾi ħan kako~u to~u ʦəʦaj, ʦiɾa to~u ʡaʦa sato~u kako~u to~u ħakħak.
S.TRANSL: 好吧!請給我一份，我下次再來買飯。
Alright, please give me one. I'll come back next time to buy rice.

S.FORM: Hay, patadoen ako kiso a mipalo i kalasan, lima polo' a limo'od konini.
S.PHON: ħaj, pataɬ~ɮo~uən ako~u kiso~u a mipaɾo~u i kaɾasan, ɾima po~uɾo~uʡ a ɾimo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮ ko~unini.
S.FORM: Hay, patadoen ako kiso a mipalo i kalasan, lima polo' a limo'od konini.
S.PHON: ħaj, pataɬ~ɮo~uən ako~u kiso~u a mipaɾo~u i kaɾasan, ɾima po~uɾo~uʡ a ɾimo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮ ko~unini.
S.TRANSL: W：好，我幫你用袋子裝起來，這樣50元。
Okay, I'll pack it in a bag for you. That'll be 50 dollars.
